title: Lightly Savory Savoy Cabbage Pilaf
description: A fluffy and light Slovakian dish featuring savory savoy cabbage cooked in a light pilaf with score-fat components for a diabetic-friendly meal.
instructions: Chop the savoy cabbage into bite-sized pieces.
Dice the onion and mince the garlic cloves.
In a pot, sauté diced onion in vegetable oil until translucent.
Add minced garlic and cook for another minute, stirring constantly.
Stir in cabbage pieces with breadcrumbs, salt, and pepper.
Pour light cream over the ingredients and mix well.
Transfer mixture to an ovenproof dish, evenly distributing vegetables and crumbs.
Bake in preheated oven for 25 minutes or until all liquid is absorbed.
Serve hot as a side dish.
